chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.S-1088 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on urgent application M.A. No.10375 /2024 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For orders on exemption application M.A. No.10376/2024 4. For hearing of main case 02.10.2024 Mr. Sulleman Dahri, advocate along with applicants. -.-.-. 1&3. Granted. 2. Overruled. 4. Through instant application applicants seek their protective bail in F.I.R. No.61/2024 registered at P.S. Kakkar District Dadu U/s 379,109 PPC. Learned Counsel for the applicants submits that applicants want to surrender before the concerned court for their pre-arrest bail, however, they are in apprehension that they will be arrested. Be that as it may, without touching merits and de-merit of the case, the applicants/accused are granted protective bail subject to their furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.10,000/- each and P.R Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court for 10 days from today. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of 10 days from today or on surrender of the applicants before the concerned Court, whichever is earlier. JUDGE Ali Haider
